revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24699703697|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Expand Japanese|走落神社 (長浜市)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Hashiriochi Shrine | native_name = 走落神社 (長浜市) | image = Hashiriochi shrine.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Hashiriochi Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.470889|136.252315}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane|lt=Ame-no-Koyane|en|Ame-no-Koyane|fr|Ama-no-Koyane-no-mikoto|it|Ame-no-Koyane|ja|天児屋命|mni|ꯑꯃꯦ-ꯅꯣ-ꯀꯣꯌꯅꯦ|pt|Ame-no-Koyane|ru|Амэ-но коянэ-но микото|simple|Ame-no-Koyane|zh|天兒屋命|qid=Q2564508|1=Ame-no-Koyane}} }} {{nihongo|'''Hashiriochi Shrine'''|走落神社 (長浜市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province|ja|近江国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11638477|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province}} ** Series ordinal: 73 ** P155: {{ill|Q11369800|ltq=Q11369800|qid=Q11369800|1=Omi Shrine (Yogo)}} ** P155: {{ill|Q135098229|ltq=Q135098229|qid=Q135098229|1=Womino Shrine (Q135098229)}} ** P156: {{ill|Ashisakino Shrine|lt=Ashisakino Shrine|qid=Q135039834|1=Ashisakino Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q844130|ltq=Q844130|qid=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}} * {{ill|Q843882|ltq=Q843882|qid=Q843882|1=Ōmi Province}} * {{ill|Ika District, Shiga|lt=Ika district|en|Ika District, Shiga|it|Distretto di Ika|ja|伊香郡|ko|이카군|zh|伊香郡|qid=Q1042353|1=Ika District, Shiga}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.470889|136.252315}} == image (P18) == * Hashiriochi shrine.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane|lt=Ame-no-Koyane|en|Ame-no-Koyane|fr|Ama-no-Koyane-no-mikoto|it|Ame-no-Koyane|ja|天児屋命|mni|ꯑꯃꯦ-ꯅꯣ-ꯀꯣꯌꯅꯦ|pt|Ame-no-Koyane|ru|Амэ-но коянэ-но микото|simple|Ame-no-Koyane|zh|天兒屋命|qid=Q2564508|1=Ame-no-Koyane}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181853 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Son-sha|lt=Son-sha|ja|村社|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == architectural style (P149) == * {{ill|Q3193781|ltq=Q3193781|qid=Q3193781|1=Kasuga-zukuri}} == country (P17) == * ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 1160005004590 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市高月町馬上1181', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:走落神社 (長浜市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11636084}} == Japanese content == {{神社 | 名称 = Hashiriochi Shrine | 画像 = [[File:Hashiriochi shrine.jpg|270px]]
Shrine building | 画像説明 = Honden gate | 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|qid=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|qid=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}{{ill|lt=Takatsuki-chō Mōjō|Q11669968|qid=Q11669968|1=Takatsuki-chō Mōjō}}1181 | 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ame-no-Koyane|Q2564508|qid=Q2564508|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane}} | 神体 = | 社格 = former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=shinsen-heihaku-ryō kyōshin-sha|1=UNKNOWN}} | 創建 = {{ill|lt=Jinki|Q1373210|qid=Q1373210|1=Jinki (era)}} era ({{ill|lt=724|Q23549|qid=Q23549|1=724}}-{{ill|lt=729|Q23561|qid=Q23561|1=729}}) | 本殿 = {{ill|lt=kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|qid=Q3193781|1=Kasuga-zukuri}} | 別名 = | 札所等 = | 例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 9|Q2504|qid=Q2504|1=April 9}} | 神事 = {{ill|lt=Okonai|Q11291908|qid=Q11291908|1=Okonai}} ({{ill|lt=February 9|Q2324|qid=Q2324|1=February 9}}) |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Hashiriochi Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Hashiriochi Shrine''' (はしりおちじんじゃ / はせおちじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} enshrined in {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|qid=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|qid=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is an {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki inner shrine|1=UNKNOWN}}. ===Enshrined deity=== *{{ill|lt=Ame-no-Koyane|Q2564508|qid=Q2564508|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane}} === Shrine crest === *Tachi-jika ===History=== It is said to have been founded in the {{ill|lt=Jinki|Q1373210|qid=Q1373210|1=Jinki (era)}} era ({{ill|lt=724|Q23549|qid=Q23549|1=724}}-{{ill|lt=729|Q23561|qid=Q23561|1=729}}).
It is also said that {{ill|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Q187550|qid=Q187550|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}}, heading for the {{ill|lt=Battle of Shizugatake|Q225562|qid=Q225562|1=Battle of Shizugatake}} in {{ill|lt=Tenshō|Q1145058|qid=Q1145058|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 11 ({{ill|lt=1583|Q6726|qid=Q6726|1=1583}}), dismounted before the shrine {{ill|lt=torii|Q234731|qid=Q234731|1=Torii}} and prayed for victory.
In {{ill|lt=Tenmei|Q1194121|qid=Q1194121|1=Tenmei}} 7 ({{ill|lt=1787|Q7763|qid=Q7763|1=1787}}), it suffered a great fire, and shrine buildings and all held documents were destroyed.
In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 9 ({{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|qid=Q7766|1=1876}}), it was ranked {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, and in Meiji 41 ({{ill|lt=1908|Q2056|qid=Q2056|1=1908}}) it was designated a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=shinsen-heihaku-ryō kyōshin-sha|1=UNKNOWN}}. [https://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1217 Shiga Prefectural Shrine Association] ===Shrine buildings / precinct=== *Honden: ikken-sha {{ill|lt=kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|qid=Q3193781|1=Kasuga-zukuri}}, cypress bark roof *Haiden: {{ill|lt=irimoya-zukuri|Q855025|qid=Q855025|1=East Asian hip-and-gable roof}} *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōfura Shrine|1=UNKNOWN}}: a branch shrine of the same-named shrine in {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kinomoto-chō Kinomoto|1=UNKNOWN}} *Gokuraku-ji Enmei {{ill|lt=Jizō Bosatsu|Q604687|qid=Q604687|lt=Jizō hall|1=Kṣitigarbha}}: former {{ill|lt=bettōji|Q11396755|qid=Q11396755|1=Bettō-ji}} temple, founded in the {{ill|lt=Yōrō|Q1373061|qid=Q1373061|1=Yōrō}} era ({{ill|lt=717|Q23532|qid=Q23532|1=717}}-{{ill|lt=724|Q23549|qid=Q23549|1=724}})'{{ill|lt=Japan Historical Place Name Compendium|Q17213509|qid=Q17213509|1=Japanese Historical Topography Series}}' 25, "Place Names of Shiga Prefecture" ({{ill|lt=Heibonsha|Q11482108|qid=Q11482108|1=Heibonsha}}, 1983) File:Hashiriochi-jinja.jpg|Approach, mid-level haiden, upper-level honden File:Hashiriochi-jinja Honden.jpg|Honden File:Hashiriochi-jinja Oofura-jinja.jpg|Ōfura Shrine File:Hashiriochi-jinja Gokurakuji-Temple.jpg|Gokuraku-ji Jizō Hall ===Festivals / annual events=== * {{ill|lt=Okonai|Q11291908|qid=Q11291908|1=Okonai}} - {{ill|lt=February 9|Q2324|qid=Q2324|1=February 9}} * {{ill|lt=Annual festival|Q11385469|qid=Q11385469|1=Reisai}} - {{ill|lt=April 9|Q2504|qid=Q2504|1=April 9}} ===Location / transportation=== 1181 {{ill|lt=Takatsuki-chō Mōjō|Q11669968|qid=Q11669968|1=Takatsuki-chō Mōjō}}, Nagahama, Shiga *18 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Takatsuki Station|Q5365710|qid=Q5365710|1=Takatsuki Station (Shiga)}} on {{ill|lt=JR West|Q502125|qid=Q502125|lt=JR|1=West Japan Railway Company}} ===Notes / references=== {{脚注ヘルプ}} ===See also=== *{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|qid=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}} *{{ill|lt=Takatsuki-chō|Q1042574|qid=Q1042574|1=Takatsuki, Shiga}} *{{ill|lt=Takatsuki-chō Mōjō|Q11669968|qid=Q11669968|1=Takatsuki-chō Mōjō}} ===External links=== *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1217 Hashiriochi Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Association) {{Shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Hashiriochi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hashiriochi Shrine]][[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nagahama, Shiga]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]]
